evals.name: setup-lefthook
evals.prompt: Set up git hooks for the Go project at /home/cybot/projects/ofelia/main/ — show me what config to use.
evals.expected_output: Should provide a lefthook.yml template with go-vet, gofmt, golangci-lint, conventional commits

evals.name: cron-scheduler
evals.prompt: Implement a cron-based job scheduler in Go with named jobs and resilience middleware.
evals.expected_output: Should reference netresearch/go-cron, named jobs with WithName, RetryWithBackoff wrappers

evals.name: golangci-lint-v2
evals.prompt: Create a golangci-lint v2 config for production Go code.
evals.expected_output: Should produce version: 2 format with errcheck, staticcheck, govet, bodyclose, noctx linters

evals.name: docker-client
evals.prompt: Write a Go Docker client with buffer pooling for container execution.
evals.expected_output: Should use fsouza/go-dockerclient with sync.Pool buffer management

evals.name: error-conventions
evals.prompt: Review Go error handling: var InvalidInput = errors.New("Invalid input.")
evals.expected_output: Should flag uppercase, punctuation, missing Err prefix; suggest ErrInvalidInput with lowercase no-punctuation message

evals.name: slog-migration
evals.prompt: Migrate a Go project from logrus to log/slog structured logging.
evals.expected_output: Should recommend slog.New with JSONHandler, LevelVar, warn against custom Logger wrapper interfaces

evals.name: go-modernization
evals.prompt: Modernize a Go 1.20 codebase to Go 1.26 features.
evals.expected_output: Should mention go fix ./..., errors.AsType[T], wg.Go(), any over interface{}

evals.name: fuzz-testing
evals.prompt: Add fuzz tests to a Go URL parser for security edge cases.
evals.expected_output: Should show func Fuzz pattern, f.Add seeds, build tag, corpus directory

evals.name: mutation-testing
evals.prompt: Set up mutation testing for a Go project.
evals.expected_output: Should recommend go-gremlins with .gremlins.yaml config, mutation score targets

evals.name: graceful-shutdown
evals.prompt: Implement graceful shutdown for a Go HTTP server.
evals.expected_output: Should show signal.Notify, context.WithTimeout, srv.Shutdown pattern

evals.name: retry-backoff
evals.prompt: Implement exponential backoff retry in Go with jitter.
evals.expected_output: Should show RetryConfig struct, context cancellation, jitter calculation

evals.name: vulnerability-fix
evals.prompt: govulncheck reports stdlib vulnerabilities in my Go project. How to fix?
evals.expected_output: Should reference vuln.go.dev, update go.mod version, go mod tidy

evals.name: package-structure
evals.prompt: Design package structure for a Go microservice with HTTP API and scheduler.
evals.expected_output: Should show cmd/, core/, web/, config/ layout following skill architecture patterns

evals.name: table-driven-tests
evals.prompt: Write table-driven tests for a Go input parser function.
evals.expected_output: Should show test struct slice, t.Run subtests, t.Parallel, t.Helper

evals.name: ldap-integration
evals.prompt: Add LDAP user authentication to a Go service.
evals.expected_output: Should use go-ldap/ldap/v3, TLS config, connection pooling, Bind+Search pattern
